2604.20273.title: ActuBench: A Multi-Agent LLM Pipeline for Generation and Evaluation of Actuarial Reasoning Tasks
2604.20273.paper_summary: We present ActuBench, a multi-agent LLM pipeline for the automated generation and evaluation of advanced actuarial assessment items aligned with the International Actuarial Association (IAA) Education Syllabus. The pipeline separates four LLM roles by adapter: one agent drafts items, one constructs distractors, a third independently verifies both stages and drives bounded one-shot repair loops, and a cost-optimized auxiliary agent handles Wikipedia-note summarization and topic labelling. The items, per-model responses and complete leaderboard are published as a browsable web interface at https://actubench.de/en/, allowing readers and practitioners to inspect individual items without a repository checkout. We evaluate 50 language models from eight providers on two complementary benchmarks -- 100 empirically hardest multiple-choice items and 100 open-ended items scored by an LLM judge -- and report three headline findings. First, multi-agent verification is load-bearing: the independent verifier flags a majority of drafted items on first pass, most of which the one-shot repair loop resolves. Second, locally-hosted open-weights inference sits on the cost-performance Pareto front: a Gemma~4 model running on consumer hardware and a Cerebras-hosted 120B open-weights model dominate the near-zero-cost region, with the latter within one item of the top of the leaderboard. Third, MCQ and LLM-as-Judge rankings differ meaningfully: the MCQ scaffold inflates the performance ceiling, and Judge-mode evaluation is needed to discriminate at the frontier.
2604.20273.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 ActuBench，一個多代理的 LLM 管道，用於自動生成和評估與國際精算師協會 (IAA) 教育大綱對齊的先進精算評估項目。該管道通過適配器分離四個 LLM 角色：一個代理負責起草項目，一個構建干擾項，第三個獨立驗證這兩個階段並驅動有界的一次性修復循環，而一個成本優化的輔助代理處理維基百科筆記摘要和主題標籤。這些項目、每個模型的回應和完整的排行榜以可瀏覽的網頁介面發布在 https://actubench.de/en/，允許讀者和從業者在不檢出庫的情況下檢查個別項目。我們在兩個互補的基準上評估了來自八個提供者的 50 個語言模型——100 個經驗上最難的多選項目和 100 個由 LLM 評判的開放式項目——並報告了三個主要發現。首先，多代理驗證是承載的：獨立驗證者在第一次檢查中標記了大多數起草的項目，其中大部分通過一次性修復循環得到解決。其次，本地托管的開放權重推理位於成本-性能的 Pareto 前沿：一個在消費者硬體上運行的 Gemma~4 模型和一個由 Cerebras 托管的 120B 開放權重模型主導了近零成本區域，後者距離排行榜頂部僅一個項目。第三，MCQ 和 LLM 作為評判的排名有意義的差異：MCQ 支架提高了性能上限，並且需要評判模式評估來區分邊界。
2604.20273.author: Jan-Philipp Schmidt et.al.
